texto: Lore is my favorite kind of story. Because it's not only historical, it's a lie everyone knows is a lie but tells anyway. I love that. Of course every story I tell is true. Completely true. Completely and utterly at least five-eighths of the way to being true, which is truer than any piece of lore and truer than most truths you'll hear.
autor: Kevin Sampsell editor "Shanghaied" by Gigi Little
explicacao: Citação de Kevin Sampsell editor "Shanghaied" by Gigi Little sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Lore is my favorite kind of story. Because it's not only historical, it's a lie everyone knows is…” articula reflexao, fact, fiction em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como fiction e verdade.
